blockers.future_action: Keep governance-core explicit as a shared profile before any lifecycle standalone claim.
blockers.reason: Lifecycle skills share governance guidance that is legitimate but not yet packaged as a separate declared dependency profile.

blockers.future_action: Separate phase runtime script closures from phase entry guidance before claiming standalone lifecycle installs.
blockers.reason: Lifecycle entries still pull broad phase runtime script closures.

blockers.future_action: Separate release proof references from phase runtime guidance before claiming standalone installability.
blockers.reason: Lifecycle skill surfaces still reference release proof support that belongs to full-pack closeout, not standalone runtime.

blockers.future_action: Model reference packages as explicit runtime support profiles before lifecycle standalone packaging.
blockers.reason: Lifecycle skills require reference package assets.

blockers.future_action: Separate reusable worker guidance from P3 runtime gates before role-skill packaging.
blockers.reason: P3 worker skills share guidance surfaces, while some also reference P3 gate runtime.

blockers.future_action: Evaluate mode wrappers or lazy imports later; do not split P3 delivery gate in WO-128.
blockers.reason: The P3 delivery gate is a shared P3 core with broad mode-specific closure.

blockers.future_action: Keep release proof orchestration as a full-pack proof profile until lifecycle standalone packaging is designed.
blockers.reason: Release proof orchestration is subprocess-level P1-P4 evidence support, not a single phase runtime dependency.

blockers.future_action: Run a separate PhaseX profile smoke before claiming standalone preview installability.
blockers.reason: PhaseX is preview/incubating and still depends on brownfield reference assets and scripts.
